title: Dave Neubauer
compiled_truth: Dave Neubauer is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-20 to 2002-03-13), Dave Neubauer sent 9 and received 671 emails, totalling 680 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kay Miller](people/kay-miller) (3), [Danny Mccarty](people/danny-mccarty) (3), [Dari Dornan](people/dari-dornan) (2), [Lynn Blair](people/lynn-blair) (2), [Kenneth Cessac](people/kenneth-cessac) (2).
